payload.agent_blocked_reason: specfuse upgrade's health-report format is not discoverable from this codebase: .specfuse/scripts/ has no report emitter, init.sh only delegates to the pip-installed `specfuse upgrade` CLI (not vendored here), and grepping the actual installed specfuse package source (<local-specfuse-checkout>) for FAIL/PASS/health_report turns up nothing — the format is not yet implemented anywhere, only described in prose in .specfuse/skills/feature-conversion/SKILL.md as a `FAIL <feature-folder>` line with no specified row grammar (delimiter, whether multi-line, exact feature-id token). Per this WU's own escalation trigger, need the real report shape (fixture or example output) before writing a parser T02 will depend on.

payload.agent_blocked_reason: AC4 cannot pass without a scaffold.py change (init()/upgrade_specfuse() must actually deploy .specfuse/skills/ from somewhere — currently it doesn't for any skill, verified via git stash against unmodified HEAD). That is driver-internals territory explicitly out of this WU's Do-not-touch scope, and a separate, pre-existing defect not introduced by T03. Escalating rather than weakening/skipping the regression per never-touch.md's verification.yml note and result-contract.md rule 4.
